mapper.insert: INSERT INTO comments (news_id, user_id, content, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{newsId}, #{userId}, #{content}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt})
mapper.select: SELECT id, news_id AS newsId, user_id AS userId, content, created_at AS createdAt, updated_at AS updatedAt FROM comments WHERE news_id = #{newsId} ORDER BY created_at DESC
